meaning: n.喇叭或号角嘹亮的吹奏声,吹牛
examples: A fanfare signalled the entrance of the king.
The ceremony opened with a fanfare of trumpets.
The product was launched amid much fanfare worldwide.
Apple today announced the iPhone 5, its latest mobile device to much fanfare.
She did so to much fanfare 18 times as a Baylor University Lady Bear.
